term.th: ขอบเขตที่มีบริบท

short.en: A boundary within which a domain model is defined and internally consistent.

full.en: A Bounded Context is a central pattern in Domain-Driven Design. It defines an explicit boundary within which a particular domain model is defined and applicable.

term.th: กลุ่มวัตถุโดเมน

short.en: A cluster of domain objects treated as a single unit, with an Aggregate Root controlling access.

full.en: An Aggregate is a cluster of associated domain objects treated as a single unit for data changes.

term.th: ภาษากลางที่ใช้ร่วมกัน

short.en: A shared language used by developers and domain experts within a Bounded Context.

full.en: Ubiquitous Language is the practice of building a common, rigorous language between developers and domain experts within a Bounded Context.
